news.headline: K92 Mining reports positive voting results at 2024 AGM. All resolutions passed. TSX: KNT; OTCQX: KNTNF.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 27, 2024, K92 Mining Inc. (referred to as "K92" or the "Company") shared the outcomes of its 2024 annual general and special meeting (“AGM”) of shareholders. The AGM, which took place as a hybrid event with both virtual and in-person attendance, saw the successful passing of all resolutions presented. The Company's common stock is listed under the tickers TSX: KNT and OTCQX: KNTNF.

news.headline: Global drone technology in education market to grow by USD 1.05 billion (2024-2028) at CAGR of 23.31% due to STEM focus - Technavio.
news.summary: In New York on June 27, 2024, it was reported that the worldwide drone technology market within the education sector is projected to increase by approximately USD 1.05 billion between 2024-2028. This growth is expected to occur with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 23.31% throughout the forecast period. The rise in focus on STEM (science, technology, engineering, and mathematics) is anticipated to be a driving factor in this market expansion.

news.headline: Mexco Energy Corp reported net income of $1,344,952 and operating revenues of $6,604,884 for fiscal year 2024.
news.summary: In Midland, Texas, on June 27, 2024, Mexco Energy Corporation (NYSE American: MXC) released its financial results for the fiscal year ending on March 31, 2024. According to the Annual Report submitted to the Securities and Exchange Commission, the company disclosed a net income of $1,344,952, translating to earnings of $0.64 per diluted share. Mexco Energy Corporation also disclosed operating revenues totaling $6,604,884 for the fiscal year 2024.

news.headline: Polybutylene Terephthalate Market to grow by USD 736.3 million from 2024-2028. Automotive industry boosts demand.
news.summary: As of June 27, 2024, the worldwide market size for polybutylene terephthalate is projected to increase by approximately USD 736.3 million between 2024 and 2028, with a forecasted compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.29%. This growth is driven by rising demand for polybutylene terephthalate.

Nasdaq emerged as the standout performer of the day, while the Dow and S&P made marginal gains. Nvidia ended its two-day winning streak.

Investors are keeping a close eye on the upcoming debate between Biden and Trump, as well as the Federal Reserve's inflation gauge. news.headline: Global finger millet market to grow by USD 5.20 billion from 2024-2028 at a CAGR of 6.78% due to low maintenance of cultivation, says Technavio.
news.summary: In recent news dated June 27, 2024, industry insights suggest that the worldwide finger millet market is projected to expand by approximately USD 5.20 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per Technavio. Throughout the forecast period, the market is anticipated to increase at a compounded annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.78%. The cultivation of finger millet is noted for its low maintenance requirements, which adds to its appeal among farmers.

news.headline: Tecsys Inc. reports record revenue for Q4 and FY2024, with SaaS revenue up 39%. SaaS RPO up 43% to $196.9 million in Q4. AEBITDA margin expected to reach 8-9% in FY2025 and 10-11% in FY2026. Q4 SaaS revenue at $14.2 million, totaling revenue at $44.0 million. FY2024 SaaS revenue at $51.9 million, totaling revenue at $171.2 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $2.8 million in Q4 and $9.6 million for FY2024. Dividend declared at $0.08 per share. Financial guidance provided for FY2025 and FY2026.
news.summary: Tecsys Inc., a supply chain management SaaS company, reported strong results for Q4 and fiscal year 2024. SaaS revenue increased by 39% to $51.9 million compared to $37.5 million in 2023. In Q4, SaaS revenue was $14.2 million, up from $11.1 million in Q4 2023. SaaS subscription bookings in Q4 saw a 108% increase to a record $8.0 million, and SaaS RPO climbed 43% to $196.9 million. Total revenue in Q4 reached a record $44.0 million, with gross margin at 47%. Operating expenses increased to $21.3 million, resulting in a loss from operations of $0.6 million. Net profit for Q4 was $0.3 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $2.8 million, up 14% from last year. For fiscal 2024, total revenue was $171.2 million, with a gross margin of 46%. Operating expenses were $76.5 million, resulting in a profit from operations of $1.9 million and a net profit of $1.8 million. Adjusted EBITDA for fiscal 2024 was $9.6 million. Tecsys provided financial guidance for FY25 and FY26, expecting total revenue growth of 7-9% and 30-32% SaaS revenue growth in FY25. A quarterly dividend of $0.08 per share was declared. These results showcase Tecsys' strong performance and growth trajectory in the SaaS market.

news.headline: Replay Destinations to develop 53-key luxury hotel in Healdsburg, CA, creating unique Sonoma-centric experience.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, a special collaboration has been formed to establish a distinctive hotel focusing on Sonoma in the vibrant wine region of HEALDSBURG, Calif. On June 27, 2024, Replay Destinations ("Replay"), a comprehensive destination development firm, revealed their intentions to create an unparalleled experience-driven hotel in the area. This innovative project aims to showcase Sonoma's essence through unique offerings and attractions. With a strong emphasis on creating a one-of-a-kind experience for guests, the project promises to bring a new dimension to the region's hospitality sector. This significant development marks an exciting phase in the evolution of the local tourism industry, with an anticipated influx of visitors and a boost to the economy. Stay tuned for more updates on this transformative endeavor set to redefine the essence of Sonoma.

news.headline: Slate Office REIT appoints Charles Pellerin to Board of Trustees, effective June 25, 2024. Pellerin to join Audit Committee.
news.summary: Slate Office REIT (TSX: SOT.UN), a prominent owner and operator of premium workplace real estate based in Toronto, has revealed the appointment of Charles Pellerin to its Board of Trustees effective June 25, 2024. Mr. Pellerin, who will be a part of the Board's Audit Committee, serves as the Principal Partner and President of Pellerin Potvin Gagnon S.E.N.C.R.L., a notable independent accounting firm in Quebec. news.headline: Port of Houston Authority engages 2000 community members in outreach activities, fostering community stewardship.

The Port Commission prioritizes community engagement and appreciates the active involvement of around 2,000 individuals from nearby communities in these activities.

news.headline: Sachem Capital Corp. retracts USD-denominated debt offering due to unfavorable market pricing conditions.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Sachem Capital Corp. (NYSE American: SACH) revealed the cancellation of its planned debt offering. news.headline: Health care support workers in Newfoundland and Labrador are struggling with low pay, resulting in recruitment and retention issues. Over 1,400 signatures have been collected for a petition urging the government to address these concerns.
news.summary: In St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, support and service staff working for Newfoundland and Labrador Health Services and represented by the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) have collected more than 1,400 signatures on a petition urging the Furey government to address recruitment and retention problems. Melissa Osmond, a housekeeper at Corne, expressed concerns about inadequate pay leading to staff attrition, stating, "We are not compensated fairly, prompting employees to seek better-paying opportunities elsewhere."

news.headline: Stay cool in downtown Plano, Texas this summer with 5 fun activities. Beat the heat for an exciting experience.

The downtown area of Plano offers a refreshing escape from the heat, providing numerous ways to stay cool and make the most of the season. A popular spot to beat the heat is the Urban Crust Icehouse Bar, where visitors can chill out and enjoy a cool atmosphere while having a great time.
